calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And (Proposed) Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-11-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LAURENCE D. HAVESON OF MOSCONE EMBLIDGE & OTIS LLP, TEL. NO. 362-3599 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. WILLIAM L. TROUTMAN OF THE NORTON ROSE FULBRIGHT US LLP, TEL. NO. (213) 892-9208 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT HYDE GROUP ET. AL. BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED REGARDING THE ISSUES RAISED BY THE COURT REGARDING NOTICE OR EFFECT ON THE WARNING ON THE PRODUCTS, ATTORNEYS'FEES AND CIVIL PENALTIES. THE COURT HAVING BEEN SATISFIED WITH THE EXPLANATION OF COUNSEL, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MARK MOORBERG's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And (Proposed) Consent Judgment is Granted. Moving party to prepare an order to include a summary of essential facts.
Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-28-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
